justification: Tiling patterns: cell placement matches MuPDF's floored integer tile blitting (pinned by the dpi-150 pass) and cell content is position-identical; the divergence is per-cell antialiasing of glyph-scale features (2-8 px strokes and rects, where nearly every pixel is an edge pixel) — MuPDF blits one scanline-AA tile, we re-render each cell with analytic AA. Measured worst (2026-07-11, @100dpi): 2.03% over d24, 5.64% over d8, mean 2.88; bounds ~25% above so real regressions still trip.
